---
title: "Introduction"
---

Briefly explain project and reason why you pick this project

## The Dataset

Briefly explain the dataset and **critical attributes** that are highlighted in this analysis

## Dataset Information

**Dataset:** {remove the brackets and fill in}\
**Source:** {remove the brackets and fill in}\
**URL:** {remove the brackets and fill in}\
**License:** {remove the brackets and fill in}\
**Date Accessed:** {remove the brackets and fill in}\
**Time Period:** {remove the brackets and fill in}

| Attribute Name | Attribute Type | Data Semantics | Cardinality |
|----------------|----------------|-------------------------|----------------|
| Latitude | Quantitative (Sequential) | Spatial coordinate (°), range: \~–65.6 to 85.1 | 1,000 |
| Longitude | Quantitative (Sequential) | Spatial coordinate (°), range: \~–179.9 to 179.9 | 1,000 |

## Impact and Utility

Briefly explain the **purpose** of the analysis.\
Address the **targeted audience** and include **at least 3 story questions**.
